testcase.name: test_ask_stories
testcase.failure:
self = <tests.test_ask_stories.TestAskStories testMethod=test_ask_stories>
def test_ask_stories(self): > ask_stories = self.hn.ask_stories(limit=10) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/test_ask_stories.py:22: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ hackernews/__init__.py:321: in ask_stories ask_stories = self._get_stories('askstories', limit) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ hackernews/__init__.py:161: in _get_stories story_ids = self._get_sync(url)[:limit] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <hackernews.HackerNews object at 0x10518ce90> url = 'https://hacker-news.firebaseio.com/v0/askstories.json'
def _get_sync(self, url): """Internal method used for GET requests
Args: url (str): URL to fetch
Returns: Individual URL request's response
Raises: HTTPError: If HTTP request failed. """ response = treq.get(url) > if response.status_code == 200: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Deferred' object has no attribute 'status_code'
hackernews/__init__.py:86: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_get_async

failure.message: RuntimeError: There is no current event loop in thread 'MainThread'.

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.test_get_async.TestGetAsync testMethod=test_get_async>
def test_get_async(self): > response = self.hn._run_async([self.url]) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/test_get_async.py:24: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ hackernews/__init__.py:138: in _run_async loop = asyncio.get_event_loop() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <asyncio.unix_events._UnixDefaultEventLoopPolicy object at 0x1054f0830>
def get_event_loop(self): """Get the event loop for the current context.
Returns an instance of EventLoop or raises an exception. """ if self._local._loop is None: > raise RuntimeError('There is no current event loop in thread %r.' % threading.current_thread().name) E RuntimeError: There is no current event loop in thread 'MainThread'.
/opt/anaconda3/envs/SWA_Rep2/lib/python3.14/asyncio/events.py:715: RuntimeError

def _get_sync(self, url): """Internal method used for GET requests
Args: url (str): URL to fetch
Returns: Individual URL request's response
Raises: HTTPError: If HTTP request failed. """ response = treq.get(url) > if response.status_code == 200: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Deferred' object has no attribute 'status_code'
hackernews/__init__.py:86: AttributeError
